brief_notes: Machine learning methods paper on PU learning with permutation testing. Numbers verified: U-AUC 0.88 to 0.54 range, 9 synthetic datasets, 10/30/50% TN ratios, 400 WDBC points from 569, 10.8% TN option, 325 PCs retaining 95% variance, n=300 BRCA/141 LUAD, 36 Rhesus, 0.474 Cliff's Delta boundary, 30% informative/70% redundant features. 5 figures. Standard structure.
